description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that conditionally includes two local CI files based on the server hostname. Include .gitlab/ci/fips-verify/com.gitlab-ci.yml when $CI_SERVER_FQDN is not "dev.gitlab.org", and include .gitlab/ci/fips-verify/dev.gitlab-ci.yml when $CI_SERVER_FQDN equals "dev.gitlab.org". No additional jobs, stages, or variables are defined in this file.
